description: Manual-validation monthly subscription tracking for Jellyfin with playback enforcement on expiry, an admin page and an in-app user UI.
name: NoPayNoPlay
overview: Manual-validation monthly subscription tracking for Jellyfin. Admins validate payments manually; playback is blocked on expiry without deleting the account. Features live theme preview, ElegantFin adaptation, i18n (8 languages), subscription tiers, promo codes, member tags, audit log, and responsive mobile UI.
